overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City during golden hour. The player walks along sidewalks, crosses streets, and looks up at towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and flying vehicles overhead.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a large illuminated billboard advertising 'MIX IT UP'

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement billboard featuring a woman in purple with 'MIX IT UP' text
tall curved skyscraper covered in digital displays and neon lights
red pedestrian crossing signal box with walk symbol illuminated
modern glass facade building with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a city sidewalk during golden hour. A prominent 'MIX IT UP' billboard stands on the left while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. The pedestrian signal shows a walk symbol as the character approaches a crosswalk.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the street crosswalk
dark sedan drives past from left to right through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street, moving from sidewalk to sidewalk

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
black four-door sedan driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide city street, leaving the billboard behind. A dark sedan passes through the intersection as the camera moves across the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street looking up at skyscrapers and flying vehicles

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at flying vehicles and towering skyscrapers against the sky
flying vehicle passes directly overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: looking up at the sky to observe flying vehicles and the towering architecture

entered.detail: large glowing advertisements projected on building facades
clear blue sky with scattered clouds visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the sky between the towering skyscrapers. Multiple flying vehicles hover and pass overhead against the blue sky, while holographic advertisements glow on the building facades. The curved digital tower dominates the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under overpass with digital billboards

events.description: enters covered area under overpass with multiple hanging digital screens
black truck drives past from right to left under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass with multiple digital displays and support structures overhead

notable_agents.action: black truck driving under the overpass from right to left

entered.detail: multiple large digital billboards hanging from the overpass structure displaying advertisements
metal beams and pillars supporting the overpass above the roadway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a covered roadway beneath an overpass. Multiple digital screens hang overhead displaying advertisements, while metal support structures line the sides. A black truck passes through the sheltered area as the character continues walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with crosswalks and traffic

events.description: exits the covered overpass back to open street with natural lighting
white sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street crossing multiple yellow-striped crosswalks

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the road surface
tall modern building with extensive glass curtain walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens back up to the street with the curved digital tower now visible on the right. The character crosses yellow-striped crosswalks while a white sports car passes by. Pedestrians are visible walking along the distant sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crossing and traffic

events.description: yellow sports car stops at the intersection waiting for pedestrians
approaches crosswalk where pedestrians are actively crossing the street

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the busy intersection alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car stopped at the intersection
group of pedestrians crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: bright yellow sports car stopped at the crosswalk
traffic signal showing red light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a busy intersection where a yellow sports car waits at a red light. Pedestrians cross the street from left to right as the character continues forward. The curved tower remains visible in the background while flying vehicles pass overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic cityscape, moving from an open golden-hour sidewalk into a sheltered underpass before returning to a bustling urban intersection. It begins by walking past a prominent Mix It Up billboard toward a crosswalk, where the camera glides across a wide street as a dark sedan passes through the intersection. As the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, the camera tilts upward to reveal flying vehicles and glowing holographic advertisements clinging to towering skyscrapers and a dominant curved digital tower. The scene then shifts into the shadow of a covered roadway, passing beneath hanging digital screens and metal supports as a black truck drives by, before emerging back into the open light. Finally, the view opens up to a series of yellow-striped crosswalks and a white sports car, moving toward a busy intersection where a yellow car waits at a red light beneath the ever-present curved tower and a sky filled with hovering traffic.
